prompt: A dreamy pastel anime portrait of a delicate young woman shown from the chest up, centered in a soft ethereal composition. She has very long, flowing, wavy {argument name="hair color" default="pale blush pink"} hair with luminous highlights, filling most of the frame and blending into the background. Her face is intentionally hidden behind a large centered solid rectangle in muted dusty blush, creating a faceless profile-picture placeholder effect. She wears a frilly, romantic, off-shoulder dress in pale blue, white, and pink with lace trim, ruffles, satin texture, and oversized ribbon bows; exactly 3 prominent bows are visible: 1 large blue bow in her hair on the right side, 1 large pink bow near her left wrist, and 1 pink bow on her right shoulder sleeve. She gently holds a small bouquet close to her chest with both hands; the bouquet contains tiny pastel flowers in light blue, white, and pink, tied with a light blue ribbon. Her hair and outfit are decorated with scattered small blossoms, and the background is filled with floating flowers, petals, tiny hearts, and faint ribbon-like swirls for a soft spring fantasy atmosphere. Use a very light high-key palette, watercolor-like anime rendering, airy linework, glossy hair shine, lace detail, soft shading, clean illustration, vertical smartphone wallpaper composition, ultra-cute shoujo aesthetic, white and blush background, elegant and innocent mood.
translatedPrompt: 一张梦幻般的粉彩色动漫肖像，描绘了一位精致的年轻女性，采用胸部以上构图，置于柔和空灵的画面中心。她拥有非常长且飘逸的波浪卷发，{argument name="hair color" default="淡腮红粉色"} 的发色带有明亮的高光，占据了大部分画面并与背景融为一体。她的面部被一个位于中心位置的柔和灰粉色实心矩形刻意遮挡，营造出一种无脸头像占位符的效果。她穿着一件褶边浪漫的露肩连衣裙，配色为淡蓝色、白色和粉色，带有蕾丝饰边、荷叶边、缎面质感和超大的丝带蝴蝶结；画面中清晰可见 3 个醒目的蝴蝶结：右侧头发上有一个蓝色大蝴蝶结，左手腕附近有一个粉色大蝴蝶结，右肩袖子上有一个粉色蝴蝶结。她双手轻轻地将一束小花捧在胸前；花束包含淡蓝色、白色和粉色的微型粉彩花朵，并系着一条淡蓝色丝带。她的头发和服装上点缀着零星的小花，背景中充满了漂浮的花朵、花瓣、微小的爱心以及淡淡的丝带状漩涡，营造出一种柔和的春日幻想氛围。采用极浅的高调配色、水彩风格的动漫渲染、轻盈的线条、光泽感的发丝、蕾丝细节、柔和的阴影、干净的插画风格、竖屏手机壁纸构图、超可爱的少女漫美学、白色与腮红粉色背景，呈现出优雅而纯真的意境。

breakdown.creativeCore: 柔和色调无脸动漫花卉肖像：此提示词可生成一张柔和的粉彩色动漫少女壁纸，画面包含遮挡面部设计、花卉细节及梦幻的少女漫美学，非常适合用作头像占位符或浪漫的手机壁纸。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, fantasy, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
